rules.rule: Every service must expose Validation, Dependency, and Service exception categories.
ValidationException must wrap all input-related errors.
DependencyException must wrap all infrastructure-related errors.
DependencyValidationException must wrap dependency-detected business rule violations.
ServiceException must wrap any unexpected exception not in Validation or Dependency categories.
Each layer must define its own exception types — never re-use types from a lower layer.
The original caught exception must always be passed as the inner exception when wrapping.
Exception messages must be human-readable and must not expose infrastructure details.
